things.name: National Archaeological Museum
things.description: The world's finest collection of ancient Greek and Roman artefacts including the Farnese Hercules

things.name: Pompeii Day Trip
things.description: The Roman city preserved in volcanic ash from the 79 AD eruption of Vesuvius — 30 minutes from Naples

things.name: Mount Vesuvius
things.description: Hike the rim of Europe's only active mainland volcano — one of the world's most famous craters

things.name: Spaccanapoli & Historic Centre
things.description: The arrow-straight Roman decumanus cutting through the UNESCO World Heritage old city of Naples

things.name: Naples Pizza Trail
things.description: The birthplace of pizza — visit Gino Sorbillo, Di Matteo and L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele since 1870

things.name: Certosa di San Martino
things.description: Stunning Baroque charterhouse and museum atop the Vomero hill with panoramic bay views

things.name: Amalfi Coast Day Trip
things.description: One of the world's most scenic coastal drives — Positano, Ravello and Amalfi village, 70 km south

things.name: Underground Naples (Napoli Sotterranea)
things.description: Labyrinthine Greek aqueducts and WWII bunkers beneath the city streets — fascinating guided tours

things.name: Castel dell'Ovo
things.description: Naples' oldest castle on a tiny island in the bay — free entry and unbeatable views of Vesuvius

things.name: Herculaneum (Ercolano)
things.description: Pompeii's smaller sister town — better preserved wooden structures and mosaics, 20 km from Naples
